title: Run Phase 2 AWGN simulations: Figs 4-6 additional product code dimensions
description:
Run the additional AWGN product code vs LDPC simulations from Figures 4, 5, and 6.

## Figure 4: (625, 225) product code

- Component: CRC-0x2b9(25,15) — `[(25,15)² CRC]` product code
- Metrics: BLER, BER, queries/bit, iterations
- Eb/N0 range: 0–3 dB

## Figure 5: (4096, 3249) product code

- Component: eBCH(64,57) — `[(64,57)² eBCH]` product code
- Rate: 0.793 (high rate, uses BG1)
- Metrics: BLER, BER, queries/bit, iterations
- Eb/N0 range: 2–4 dB

## Figure 6: (256, 49) product code

- Component: eBCH(16,7) — `[(16,7)² eBCH]` product code
- Rate: 0.191 (very low rate)
- Metrics: BLER, BER, queries/bit, iterations
- Eb/N0 range: 0–4 dB

## Acceptance Criteria

- All three simulations run to completion with sufficient statistics.
- Results match paper's reference data within expected tolerance.
- All component codes (CRC, eBCH(64,57), eBCH(16,7)) work correctly in the product code framework.
- Results saved in CSV/JSON format.

## Location

Extend simulation runners from Phase 1.
